<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Unarchive Evaluator"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/evaluators/{evaluator_id}/unarchive"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Restore a soft-deleted evaluator artifact.

Clears `deleted_at` on the evaluator so it re-appears in `/query`
responses.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
